original text:
Made in the USA. Rebuild Price? $350 - Less Than 20% of MSRP! ~ The Aida features a 2-year warranty to the original owner.
The Soundsmith Norma is a medium-output version of the incredible Aida high-output cartridge. If your phonostage has a fixed gain setting between 48dB-58dB, no longer is there any fear of overloading with a high output MM cartridge or having to ramp up the volume with a low output MC type.
The Aida cartridge by The Soundsmith (formerly SMMC1) is a Stereophile A RATED cartridge. That is the "price is no object" range. Where are we in the price range of those cartridges? At the bottom. There isn't anyone even close to our price. Did Michael Fremer take some flack for doing that? You bet. How did he respond?? he said - "I put it in that group - because it deserved to BE in that group".
All top end cartridges from all manufacturers are handmade. The real issue is that when you are manufacturing something so tiny, that has to perform so well, that all of them are NOT the same. If you don't see this statement from other manufacturers, then this is a "secret" they don't want to share, and quite understandably so.
We carefully hand build each and every cartridge, test them, and keep accurate records by serial number of their performance. Those that meet or exceed specifications are sold. But, there are always a few that don't measure well. What do we do with them? We don't sell them. We break them down and re-use some parts that can be used again. Does this cost real money? You bet. But what it does do is this.....the ones that DO pass our stringent testing out-perform many cartridges selling for two, three, four, or even five times the price. Are we unabashedly proud of our hand-made cartridges??
Our cartridges overturn the myth that moving coil cartridges are the only path towards perfection. After all, what is the accepted "advantage" of moving coil cartridges? Low effective moving mass, right? Well, we've got less. Much less. And if you understand EFFECTIVE moving mass, Less IS more. Why is that good? Because when you lower the moving system mass, it's easier to control. If it's easier to control, the stylus can stay in better contact with the groove walls. That's good because if you can't stay in contact with the groove walls, you can't hear what's on the record.
Is a high gain moving coil preamp required? No. "Aida" is designed to be used with a Moving Magnet preamp. No "step-up" transformers. No finicky multi-stage ultra high gain preamp required. Less is more here, too.

Download Mover is listed in File Managers category and made available by Ntworks.net for Windows. Unfortunately, we have not yet reviewed Download Mover. If you would like to submit a review of this software, we encourage you to submit us something!
What is Download Mover software from Ntworks.net, what is it used for and how to use it?
Download and install Download Mover safely and without concerns.
Download Mover is a software product developed by Ntworks.net and it is listed in File category under File Managers. Download Mover is a free software product and it is fully functional for an unlimited time although there may be other versions of this software product. You can run Download Mover on all modern Windows OS operating systems. Download Mover was last time updated on 12.07.2006 and it has 5,014 downloads on Download.hr portal. Download and install Download Mover safely and without concerns.
What do you think about Download Mover?
Download.hr periodically updates software information of Download Mover from the software publisher (Ntworks.net), but some information may be slightly out-of-date or incorrect. Download Mover version 1.1 for Windows was listed on Download.hr on 12.07.2006 and it is marked as Freeware.
All software products that you can find on Download.hr, including Download Mover, are either free, freeware, shareware, full version, trial, demo or open-source. You can't download any crack or serial number for Download Mover on Download.hr. Every software that you are able to download on our site is freely downloadable and 100% legal. There is no crack, serial number, keygen, hack or activation key for Download Mover present here nor we support any illegal way of software activation. If you like software product please consider supporting the author and buying product. If you can not afford to buy product consider the use of alternative free products.
Is it safe to download and install Download Mover?
Download Mover was checked for possible viruses by various leading antivirus software products and it is proven to be 100% clean and safe. Although, no malware, spyware or other malicious threats was found we strongly advise you to check product again before installing it on your PC.
Please note that laws concerning the use of Download Mover may vary from country to country. Please be sure that you are using Download Mover in accordance with the law in your country.
How to uninstall Download Mover?
How do I uninstall Download Mover in Windows Vista / Windows 7 / Windows 8 / Windows 10 OS?
Make sure the "Download Mover" is highlighted and then make right click, and select Uninstall/Change.
How do I uninstall Download Mover in Windows XP?
Make sure the "Download Mover" is highlighted, then click "Remove/Uninstall."
How do I uninstall Download Mover in Windows 95, 98, Me, NT, 2000?
Select "Download Mover" and right click, then select Uninstall/Change.

The RICHARTZ one blade knife for professionals. Long-lasting and robust in RICHARTZ quality with a strong, stainless steel blade. The well-shaped handle fits perfectly in the hand and enables professional working.
Sturdy all-purpose knife. Strong stainless steel blade.
Advertising: Print and laser engraving MOQ 1 piece. Colored grip zone MOQ 3.000 pieces. Individual packaging MOQ 1.000 pieces.
